'''âp-p-th''' ('''kapapath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:champ|champ]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:champ|champ]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-p-th
|-
! Lemma
| kapapath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipapath|thipapath]] || [[word:jipapath|jipapath]] || [[word:shipapath|shipapath]] || [[word:kipapath|kipapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupapath|thuthupapath]] || [[word:jujupapath|jujupapath]] || [[word:shushupapath|shushupapath]] || [[word:kukupapath|kukupapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupapath|thupapath]] || [[word:jupapath|jupapath]] || [[word:shupapath|shupapath]] || [[word:kupapath|kupapath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupapath|thupapath]] || [[word:jupapath|jupapath]] || [[word:shupapath|shupapath]] || [[word:kupapath|kupapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepapath|thepapath]] || [[word:jepapath|jepapath]] || [[word:shepapath|shepapath]] || [[word:kepapath|kepapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopapath|thothopapath]] || [[word:jojopapath|jojopapath]] || [[word:shoshopapath|shoshopapath]] || [[word:kokopapath|kokopapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopapath|thopapath]] || [[word:jopapath|jopapath]] || [[word:shopapath|shopapath]] || [[word:kopapath|kopapath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopapath|thopapath]] || [[word:jopapath|jopapath]] || [[word:shopapath|shopapath]] || [[word:kopapath|kopapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpapath|thĂŠpapath]] || [[word:jĂŠpapath|jĂŠpapath]] || [[word:shĂŠpapath|shĂŠpapath]] || [[word:kĂŠpapath|kĂŠpapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapapath|thathapapath]] || [[word:jajapapath|jajapapath]] || [[word:shashapapath|shashapapath]] || [[word:kakapapath|kakapapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapapath|thapapath]] || [[word:japapath|japapath]] || [[word:shapapath|shapapath]] || [[word:kapapath|kapapath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapapath|thapapath]] || [[word:japapath|japapath]] || [[word:shapapath|shapapath]] || [[word:kapapath|kapapath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapapath|shapapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapapath|goshapapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapapath|gokishapapath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapapathnĂŒ|shapapathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapapathnknĂŒ|goshapapathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapathnĂŒ|gokishapapathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapapathshĂ«|shapapathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapapathnkshĂ«|goshapapathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapapathshĂ«|gokishapapathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapathro|shapapathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapathnkro|goshapapathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapathro|gokishapapathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapathmu|shapapathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapathnkmu|goshapapathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapathmu|gokishapapathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapapathsher|shapapathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapapathnksher|goshapapathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapapathsher|gokishapapathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapapathng|shapapathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapapathnkng|goshapapathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapapathng|gokishapapathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapapathya|shapapathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapapathnkya|goshapapathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapapathya|gokishapapathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapapathyam|shapapathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapapathnkyam|goshapapathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapapathyam|gokishapapathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapathnĂŒshĂ«|shapapathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapapathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapapathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapathnĂŒro|shapapathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapathnknĂŒro|goshapapathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapathnĂŒro|gokishapapathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapathnĂŒmu|shapapathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapathnknĂŒmu|goshapapathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapathnĂŒmu|gokishapapathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapathshĂ«nĂŒ|shapapathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapapathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapapathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapathshĂ«ro|shapapathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapathnkshĂ«ro|goshapapathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapathshĂ«ro|gokishapapathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapathshĂ«mu|shapapathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapathnkshĂ«mu|goshapapathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapathshĂ«mu|gokishapapathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapathronĂŒ|shapapathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapathnkronĂŒ|goshapapathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapathronĂŒ|gokishapapathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapathroshĂ«|shapapathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapathnkroshĂ«|goshapapathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapathroshĂ«|gokishapapathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapapathromu|shapapathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapapathnkromu|goshapapathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapapathromu|gokishapapathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapapathmunĂŒ|shapapathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapapathnkmunĂŒ|goshapapathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapapathmunĂŒ|gokishapapathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapapathmushĂ«|shapapathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapapathnkmushĂ«|goshapapathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapapathmushĂ«|gokishapapathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapapathmuro|shapapathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapapathnkmuro|goshapapathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapapathmuro|gokishapapathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
